name: Texas Table Sauce for Barbecue
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-cup measure, combine the vinegar and warm water.
2. Stir in the salt, pepper, paprika, brown sugar, molasses, and dry mustard.
3. Set aside to boil over medium/low heat.
4. Transfer the mixture to an outside grill and simmer uncovered for about an hour, stirring occasionally.
5. Store in the refrigerator.
6. Serve hot with barbecue (this is very similar to one served in one of our more popular BBQ restaurants).
